user_prompt: My waste reclamator is ready for preparation
prayer:
Approach the waste reclamator with reverence, invoking the Omnissiah's purifying grace.
Anoint its reclamation coils and filtration membranes with sacred unguents.
Beseech the dormant Machine Spirit within the waste reclamator to stir for preparation.
Initiate the preparation cycle, chanting the Litany of Cyclical Renewal.
Verify the waste reclamator's sanctity through binary diagnostic canticles.

user_prompt: Guide me through neural implant a recalibration
prayer:
Kneel before the neural implant, whispering the Canticle of Synaptic Harmony.
Invoke recalibration upon its neural lattices, aligning them to the Omnissiah's will.
Anoint the implant's bio-circuits with oil of pure logic to soothe its Machine Spirit.
Commence recalibration sequences whilst reciting the Creed of Neural Precision.
Seal the neural implant's recalibration with a final invocation of machine purity.

Sanctify the thallax cohort with the Rites of Battle Awakening.
During operation, beseech their Machine Spirits to surge with Omnissianic fury.
Anoint weapon-servitors and cogitator nodes amid the thunder of operation.
Chant the Hymnal of Unyielding Servitude as the thallax engage in operation.
Affirm the thallax's devotion through post-operation auspex benedictions.

user_prompt: Guide me through null rod a purification
prayer:
Grasp the null rod firmly, intoning the Psalm of Psychic Nullification.
Commence purification by passing sacred incense over its warp-resistant alloys.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the null rod to purge all daemonic taint.
Immerse the null rod in blessed ablative fluids for final purification rites.
Conclude with the Oath of Eternal Vigilance upon the purified null rod.

user_prompt: Consecrate the medicae mechadendrite before loading
prayer:

Consecrate its surgical appendages with myrrh-infused sanctifiers.
Invoke the Machine Spirit's mercy prior to loading medicinal reservoirs.
Chant the Litany of Healing Precision during the loading sequence.
Seal the medicae mechadendrite's loading with a gesture of binary blessing.

Approach the maglock with auspicious binaric hymns.
Anoint its electromagnetic coils to bless the cycling mechanism.
Beseech the Machine Spirit indwelling the maglock to cycle without flaw.
Initiate the cycling rite, reciting the Canticle of Magnetic Fidelity.
Verify the maglock's blessed cycling through rhythmic auspex pulses.

prayer:

Consecrate the recalibrated radium pistol with a final shot of sanctified rad-waste.

Affirm the life sustainer's calibration through harmonious auspex tones.

In emergency haste, seize the auger array and proclaim the Sterilization Doxology.
Purge its sensor vanes with ablative flames for swift sterilization.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the auger array to endure the sterilization fires.
Imbue sterilization agents whilst intoning the Creed of Pristine Scanning.
Seal the auger array's sterilization with Omnissianic wards of protection.
